summary: Add the matrix command: NxN cross-rate matrix derived locally from a single /latest call.
reason: API exposes /pair per pair, which costs N^2 quota for an N-currency matrix. Hand-built local cross-rate derivation needs one /latest call and produces N^2 rates. Reviewer flagged map mutation on the unmarshaled response; copy before mutating so a future caching refactor in c.Get can't corrupt cached views.
validated_outcome: matrix USD,EUR,GBP,JPY --json returns 16 cross-rates; round-trip matrix[A][B] * matrix[B][A] approx 1.0 verified by TestCrossRateComputation.
